kept.text:
$CRCL 🚨
Why are we bullish on $CRCL , explaining it in terms a Kid can understand
"Imagine the plumbing that lets banks and apps move dollars instantly around the world without wires or delays — Circle built that pipe with USDC, the stablecoin trillions of dollars flow through daily. Big players like Visa, Stripe, and JPMorgan pay Circle because its system is faster and cheaper than old-school SWIFT, and switching would mean rebuilding everything from scratch. Traders own CRCL for stablecoin tolls on global money flows — volume surges mean fatter margins."
